_doc: Prototype-mode player. Extends the legacy player.json. HP + slow regen are derived from balance.json (combat.player.HP, combat.player.regen_*). InventoryStack slotCapacity is bumped to balance.economy.carry_capacity_per_slot (default 30) so the player can chop ~6 trees of wood in one loop and afford the first Wood Box without needing pre-existing storage — fixes the chicken-and-egg where storage_cost > max_carry. Sword skill retained from parent.
